product.name: Full Size Headboard Only, Metal Headboard with Adapters, Minimalist Industrial Style for Full Size Beds, Greige
features: Full Size: With dimensions of 53.1"W x 40.2"H, this industrial-style headboard is designed to fit full-size bed frames and features an ideal height that serves as an aesthetically pleasing addition to your bed

Bed Frame Adapters: The headboard comes with 2 bed frame adapters featuring 4 height adjustment slots, allowing flexible compatibility with bed frames of different heights. It ensures a secure connection between the headboard and the bed frame

Premium Materials: Crafted from sturdy, thickened metal tubes and smooth, enduring particleboard, the full headboard is built to last. Equipped with adjustable feet and an anti-tip device, it has a robust structure for a long-lasting usage experience

Stylish Industrial Design: With a sleek design, the headboard combines a black metal frame with retro-inspired greige panels, exuding a strong industrial vibe. It's not only functional but also transforms your sleep space into an eye-catching focal point

Easy Assembly: Featuring a simple structure, the headboard comes with a detailed instruction manual and numbered parts for a straightforward assembly process, making it effortless for you to complete the setup and enjoy the headboard in no time
